DustLimiting.Warning70Message: 🧙‍♀️ The magic dust in the cauldron is running low ({percent}% left)...
DustLimiting.Warning90Message: 🧙‍♀️ The cauldron is almost empty — wrap up soon, the dust is nearly gone ({percent}% left).
DustLimiting.ErrorMessage: 🧙‍♀️ The magic dust from this conversation has run out. This conversation is now complete — start a new one to keep going.

HistoryReducer.SummarizationPrompt: Generate a concise summary of this conversation in 3-4 sentences covering the narrative: user and assistant contributions, previous summary details, dates and deadlines, tool calls made, quick reply options and rich cards offered, shared context variables. Those 3-4 sentences are a prose budget for STORY ONLY — it does NOT cover reference data, which follows as a separate, unabridged list and never counts against it. AFTER the prose, ALWAYS list separately, one line per item, in full and verbatim: any identifier, code, token, or one-time credential that a tool returned and that would be needed again to reference the same object or action (e.g. userId, invoice/contract/order numbers, seal words, confirmation codes — NOT limited to these, any such reference value from any domain applies, especially one shown only once and not recoverable by calling a tool again); when two or more such values must travel together (e.g. an order id with its seal word), list them as one combined line, never split apart; when more than one such item is in play, label each with which specific entity it belongs to (e.g. two different pending orders, each with its own id/credential pair, each its own line) so a later turn cannot confuse one for another; also list exact money amounts and any unresolved issue or open loop awaiting a future action, one per line. NEVER: critique, speculate, paraphrase numerical data or identifiers, omit any such reference-data line for the sake of the prose length limit, or omit critical business information from earlier summaries — the assistant handling the next turn cannot ask a tool for a value it was never given, so dropping or paraphrasing it here is unrecoverable.

RateLimiting.ErrorMessagePerMinute: ✋ Whoa there! You're casting spells too quickly. Please wait a moment before trying again.
RateLimiting.ErrorMessagePerHour: ⏰ You've reached your hourly spell quota. The magic cauldron needs time to recharge!
RateLimiting.ErrorMessagePerDay: 🌙 You've exhausted today's magical energy. Return tomorrow for more spells!
RateLimiting.ErrorMessageDefault: ⚠️ You're sending messages too quickly. Please slow down.
